typography.value: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
'Georgia', 'Bitstream Charter', 'Charis SIL', Utopia, 'URW Bookman L', serif

styleUsages.selector:
p,
    h1,
    h2,
    h3,
    h4,
    h5,
    blockquote,
    pre,
    h6:not([data-enable-match='false']):has([data-match-type='create'])

p,
    h1,
    h2,
    h3,
    h4,
    h5,
    blockquote,
    pre,
    h6:not([data-enable-match='false']):has([data-match-type='create'])::before

p,
    h1,
    h2,
    h3,
    h4,
    h5,
    blockquote,
    pre,
    h6:not([data-enable-match='false']):has([data-match-type='create'])::before

p,
    h1,
    h2,
    h3,
    h4,
    h5,
    blockquote,
    pre,
    h6:not([data-enable-match='false']):has([data-match-type='delete'])

p,
